title: Creating an "About" Page
content_md:
# Creating an "About" Page

- Code: 3063310a
- Source: https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-mastery-pro/classroom/63a81f62?md=3063310ad6354ac2b9d6600ac21d958a
- Video: https://www.loom.com/share/da116cc677434810973298fdbd6a46ae?sid=0732cc26-3232-4e20-8ff4-c0acf64f50e3?hide_owner=true&hide_share=true&hide_title=true&hideEmbedTopBar=true
- Duration: 2m 36s

## Description

_(no description)_

transcript.text: So let's talk about your about me or about us page
What I want to touch on here again, this is in keeping with the EEAT
We want to make it as obvious to Google as possible
Who is writing the content on the website and that the person writing that content on your website is a real person?
Okay, five years ago. We could create an about me page with a with an AI generated image of a face
Made up story and it would pass that doesn't work anymore today. Okay?
So here I'll add one
So on your about me page what we need to do again the goal here
We're trying to make sure Google understands that you are a real person or the author of this website is a real person
So we need to include one a method to get in contact. You've got to be transparent. You need a personal story
Something that maybe hopefully ideally is verifiable on the internet through other sources
You need an author's bio box a little image of you and information like that
You need additional social media profiles and you should link to them from your about me page
You should have Facebook you should have LinkedIn you should have Twitter X whatever it's called
You can have Pinterest you can have Instagram
Any number of other social media profiles, but you should link to them here and they should be reasonably active
Okay, your profile should be created the photo should be of the same person, but not the same photo on every profile
And ideally you're going to be at least moderately active on a lot of these different profiles
The fifth item you need milk multimedia of you, okay?
Ideally, it's going to be a video if you can't do that for whatever reason you should just do a video if you can't do that
Then the absolute minimum is multiple images of you again
We're trying to establish that you are a real person the same image everywhere easily can be AI generated getting multiple images
From different angles different lighting, you know some personal some formal some business
That makes it harder to fake with AI you can still do it, but it makes it harder
So that's why a video is definitely ideal
Which by the way can also be faked with AI, but again
it's more difficult a higher bar to try to fake all of that and
Finally a Google business profile that links to your about me page if you're non-local if it's a local business
Obviously link your Google business profile to your homepage or your location page
But if you're non-local business create a Google business profile and link to your about me page
Creating a Google business profile. I know it seems silly if you're non-local
But that goes a long way towards showing Google you are a real business a real person
